evals.name: flat-normalize
evals.expected_output: Brief TL;DR + flow diagram + walkthrough explaining normalizeNames does title-case + strip diacritics, that empty attributes means input flows from mapping context.

evals.name: email-fallback-chain
evals.expected_output: TL;DR fallback chain AD->Workday->empty. Flow diagram. Walkthrough notes empty terminator avoids null but only safe at outermost.

evals.name: lcs-date-tree
evals.expected_output: TL;DR ordered LCS decision tree based on dates. Flow diagram with all branches. Walkthrough explaining order matters (archived before terminated), ignoreErrors saves bad data, terminal static guarantees value.

evals.name: velocity-heavy-static
evals.expected_output: TL;DR username = finitial + (middle initial if exists) + lastname all lowercase. Flow showing variable bindings and the if/else. Walkthrough flags Velocity multi-branch as anti-pattern, suggests refactor to conditional/concat.

evals.name: with-reference
evals.expected_output: TL;DR delegates to another named transform. Explicitly says cannot fully explain without that other transform. Suggests pasting it for full picture.
